---
applyTo: "**/business-flow/**"
description: "Alias of the local business-flow artifact rules for generated outputs."
---

# Business Flow Quality Rules

Use the same operational contract as `api-testing.instructions.md` in this repository version:

- source specs live in `specs/`
- prompt source of truth lives in `.github/prompts/`
- generated local artifacts live in `business-flow/<slug>/`
- runtime tooling remains committed in source code
- every generated claim must be evidence-backed
- `specs/` and `business-flow/` must stay out of Git
